raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find files with permissions not allowing others write. That is mode where others write bit not set. So find /workspace -type f -name "*.txt" ! -perm -o=w . Actually -perm -o=w matches files where others write bit set. We want those that do NOT have that bit. So ! -perm -o=w. Also maybe restrict to text files: *.txt. So command: find /workspace -type f -name "*.txt" ! -perm -o=w. That's it.

So command: find /workspace -type f -name "*.txt" ! -perm -o=w. That's it.
